description: The team returns to the Playground with the prisoners safe but tensions high. Bobbi Morse and Gonzales discuss the implications of bringing back Skye and Lincoln, with Gonzales revealing he intends to keep enhanced people on the base for further study. The episode touches on internal S.H.I.E.L.D. politics and foreshadows future conflicts between the management and the powered individuals.

transcript.line: Sir, the attack team's on their way back. They report the entire HYDRA base has been destroyed.
There was no sign of this Dr. List. He may have escaped. Sir? Are you... are you okay?
It's okay. She's in our custody, and we got what we wanted.
Enhanced people here on the base.
That's why you were willing to go along with Coulson's plan. You wanted the enhanced people he'd rescue.
I didn't expect Skye, but we have her and one of her friends. Maybe we can learn how many are out there.
I think that we need to discuss this.

Discuss what? What are we discussing now? Time to honor our agreement. Here you go. Unlocked and all yours. Go nuts. At least until Fury shows up and asks for it back. Oh. Spoiler alert. Oh. Hey. I have to take this. Hi. Can you hang on a second?
